item.title: When is the next results date for Vakrangee Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Vakrangee Ltd is April 29, 2026. Time: Apr 27 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Inspirisys Solutions Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Inspirisys Solutions Ltd is 08 May 2026. Time: Apr 27 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Bhageria Industries Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Bhageria Industries Ltd is 02 May 2026. Time: Apr 27 2026 11:16 PM IST

item.title: Bajaj Housing Finance Q4 FY26: Robust Growth Momentum Meets Valuation Headwinds
item.description: Bajaj Housing Finance Ltd., the housing finance arm of Bajaj Finance, delivered a strong operational performance in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹669.19 crores, marking a marginal sequential increase of 0.65% quarter-on-quarter and a robust 14.06% year-on-year growth. However, the stock continues to struggle under the weight of premium valuations, trading 33.51% below its 52-week high of ₹137.00, with shares closing at ₹91.09 on April 27, 2026, reflecting a market capitalisation of ₹75,691 crores. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:32 PM IST

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Growth Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd., one of India's largest asset management companies with total assets under management of ₹3.63 lakh crores, reported a robust quarter for the three months ended March 2026, with consolidated net profit climbing 28.84% year-on-year to ₹384.72 crores. The strong performance, however, comes against a backdrop of stretched valuations, with the stock trading at a price-to-earnings ratio of 44 times—double the industry average—raising questions about sustainability at current levels. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:31 PM IST

item.title: AVI Polymers Q4 FY26: Stellar Turnaround with 46% QoQ Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: AVI Polymers Ltd., a micro-cap specialty chemicals manufacturer, delivered a remarkable operational turnaround in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹10.24 crores—a robust 46.08% quarter-on-quarter surge from ₹7.01 crores in Q3 FY26. The Ranchi-based polymer compounder, which serves the cable, plastics, and textile industries, demonstrated impressive sequential momentum with net sales climbing 13.57% QoQ to ₹150.28 crores. The stock responded enthusiastically, rallying 4.99% on April 27, 2026, to close at ₹17.26, though the company's market capitalisation remains modest at ₹162.00 crores. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:31 PM IST

item.title: Mahindra Holidays Q4 FY26: Strong Quarter Masks Underlying Profitability Concerns
item.description: Mahindra Holidays & Resorts India Ltd., India's leading vacation ownership company with over 2.8 lakh members and 84 resorts, reported a dramatic turnaround in Q4 FY26 (January-March 2026) with consolidated net profit surging to ₹41.56 crores from just ₹2.23 crores in the previous quarter—a remarkable 1,763.68% quarter-on-quarter jump. However, this seemingly impressive performance conceals deeper profitability concerns, as the year-on-year comparison reveals a stark 43.13% decline from ₹73.08 crores in Q4 FY25. The stock, currently trading at ₹255.00 with a market capitalisation of ₹5,305 crores, has declined 1.30% following the results announcement, extending its bearish trend that began in mid-April. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:31 PM IST

item.title: Kirloskar Pneumatic Q4 FY26: Stellar Quarter Powers 79% Profit Surge, But Valuation Concerns Linger
item.description: Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd., a leading player in India's compressors, pumps, and diesel engines sector, delivered an exceptional performance in Q4 FY26, posting a consolidated net profit of ₹143.80 crores—a remarkable surge of 79.08% year-on-year and an extraordinary 240.76% quarter-on-quarter. The ₹8,997 crore market capitalisation company witnessed its stock rally 8.35% to ₹1,449.35 following the results announcement, reflecting investor enthusiasm over the strong operational performance despite trading at elevated valuation multiples. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:31 PM IST

item.title: Trishakti Industries Q4 FY26: Stellar Revenue Growth Masks Profitability Concerns as Valuation Soars
item.description: Trishakti Industries Limited, a micro-cap non-banking financial company (NBFC), reported consolidated net profit of ₹2.57 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a robust 97.69% year-on-year growth but a modest 6.64% sequential increase. The ₹293 crore market capitalisation company saw its stock plunge 5.35% to ₹168.20 on April 27, 2026, despite delivering triple-digit revenue expansion and maintaining positive operational momentum across key metrics. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:30 PM IST

item.title: City Union Bank Q4 FY26: Asset Quality Revival Powers 24.9% Profit Surge
item.description: City Union Bank Ltd., one of India's leading private sector banks with a strong presence across South India, delivered a robust fourth-quarter performance for FY2026, posting a net profit of ₹359.56 crores—marking a sequential increase of 8.25% from Q3 FY26 and a stellar year-on-year growth of 24.86%. The Kumbakonam-headquartered lender demonstrated remarkable improvement in asset quality metrics whilst maintaining healthy profitability, though the stock has retraced 15.19% from its 52-week high of ₹319.95, currently trading at ₹271.35 with a market capitalisation of ₹19,746 crores. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:30 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Marked Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has delivered a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 63.0% of the 191 companies declaring results reporting positive outcomes. This represents a significant uptick compared to the preceding three quarters, signalling a broad-based recovery across market capitalisation segments and sectors. Time: Apr 27 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Fidel Softech Q4 FY26: Stellar 155% Revenue Surge Powers Strong Profitability
item.description: Fidel Softech Ltd., a micro-cap software consulting firm, delivered an exceptional performance in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹4.35 crores—a robust increase of 31.82% quarter-on-quarter and 42.16% year-on-year. The company's shares surged 11.46% following the results announcement, reflecting strong investor confidence in the firm's growth trajectory. With a market capitalisation of ₹193.00 crores and current price of ₹156.05, the stock has demonstrated remarkable resilience in a challenging sector environment. Time: Apr 27 2026 08:01 PM IST

item.title: SBI Cards Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns as Stock Languishes 22% Below Year-Ago Levels
item.description: SBI Cards & Payment Services Ltd., India's second-largest credit card issuer with a market capitalisation of ₹64,371 crores, reported a robust 14.07% year-on-year growth in net profit to ₹609.30 crores for Q4 FY26, marking the highest quarterly profit in the company's history. However, despite the strong operational performance, the stock continues to trade at ₹671.00, down 22.52% over the past year, reflecting investor concerns about premium valuation and a challenging technical environment. Time: Apr 27 2026 08:01 PM IST

item.title: Shekhawati Industries Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masks Deeper Revenue Concerns
item.description: Shekhawati Industries Ltd., a micro-cap garments and apparels manufacturer, reported a dramatic turnaround in profitability for Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹4.63 crores compared to a loss of ₹0.16 crores in the year-ago quarter. However, this impressive bottom-line recovery came against a backdrop of persistent revenue challenges, with net sales declining 25.73% year-on-year to ₹8.14 crores. The stock, trading at ₹17.58 with a market capitalisation of ₹58.00 crores, has struggled over the past year, declining 26.20% whilst the broader market fell just 2.41%. Time: Apr 27 2026 08:01 PM IST

item.title: Supreme Industries Q4 FY26: Strong Quarter Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Supreme Industries Ltd., India's largest plastic products manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹47,333 crores, delivered a robust fourth quarter performance for FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹433.57 crores—a remarkable 182.70% surge quarter-on-quarter and 47.50% growth year-on-year. The stock, trading at ₹3,691.35, gained 0.82% following the results announcement, though it remains 22.12% below its 52-week high of ₹4,740.00. Time: Apr 27 2026 08:01 PM IST
